The '''Imperial Hotel''' was a [[Hotel/Legends|hotel]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. [[Tribune]] [[Challer]] had a [[Prostitute/Legends|call girl]] there, and was also [[Poison/Legends|poisoned]] there.

==Appearances==
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 35|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 35]] {{1st}}
